caption: The video appears to be a news segment covering a political event, likely involving a confrontation or protest. The scene shows a group of people gathered around a man who seems to be a public figure, possibly a politician, as he is being escorted by security personnel. The crowd includes individuals holding up their phones, presumably recording the event. The text on the screen suggests that this is related to a political party, with mentions of "Congress" and "JDU," indicating a rivalry or disagreement between these parties. The visuals and text imply a tense atmosphere, with the focus on the central figure and the surrounding crowd's reactions. The time stamp indicates that this news segment was broadcast at 10:03 PM.
